title: UK Airspace Design Support Fund Eligibility and Guidelines Published

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The UK Airspace Design Support Fund has released its rules and eligibility criteria, outlining who can apply for financial assistance. This fund aims to support various airspace design projects across the UK, ensuring the efficient use and management of airspace.

As aviation continues to play a crucial role in connecting communities, particularly in regions such as the Highlands and Islands of Scotland, initiatives like this fund are essential for enhancing operational efficiency and future planning in the sector.

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Guidance: UK Airspace Design Support Fund rules and eligibility criteria
